name: Yu Jimin - Run Away
description:
"𝓟lease, tell me that you're ready to run away with me"
PURE ANGST - FEM.POV
♡♡♡

This whole story started a long time ago, too long ago, back in elementary school, when you were a very shy and quiet kid, and the only person who interacted with you at that time was Jimin, and that's why everything got so twisted. You started dating in middle school, because she joked in third grade about what she'd do to your index finger like her dad did to her mom.

One day in 6th grade, Jimin put a toy ring on your finger and put the same one on her finger, making you swear what would one day be a real ring, and since then you have never let yourself take it off. But when you started dating, you faced the cruelties of the world, in particular what no one approved of your relationship, considering it something vile and forbidden, which is why it had to be kept secret, but despite all that pressure, your love for each other grew stronger and stronger, until one moment.

In high school, your parents forced you to move to another country without warning, and you couldn't do anything but agree, but your thoughts were filled with what would happen to you and your relationship. After a while, Yu was able to find you, and you talked online for a long time. Soon your parents introduced you to the son of a rich family they knew, you didn't even hide the fact that you weren't interested in him, but he and his parents were persistent.

Your parents didn't want to hear anything, they needed the money too badly, and the good money this guy's parents were only willing to pay for a serious marriage. This news took you aback. More specifically the fact that they were willing to sell you to other people for a large sum of money, which made you feel even worse. You texted Jimin the same night, and then she disappeared for a while, and you couldn't understand why, finally accepting what she had disappeared from your life without wanting to hurt you or herself.

Time came, all this fuss of preparing for a wedding with a man you hated killed you, and you for all this time never smiled once, because what are we talking about if you were preparing to spend your life with someone you did not love, instead of the girl with whom you really wanted to be and for better and for worse.

That terrible day came, it was only a couple of hours before the official signing of your marriage, and you were in the hotel room, which was rented to you by the parents of the groom put on a dress that you hated, looking at yourself in the mirror with disgust, and with a special hatred for the wedding ring, why on your finger was not a ring from Jimin? Why wasn't she the person you would have spent the rest of your life with? All these questions tormented you, worsening your already unstable morale.

There was a knock on the door, you once again expected to see your mother there, who for the thousandth time would come to you with useless advice and reques
